name: chr1_1q21_3_olfactory_receptor
description: 1q21.3 sub-cluster of olfactory-receptor genes adjacent to the LCE (late-cornified-envelope) gene cluster that hosts the LCE3B-LCE3C deletion associated with psoriasis susceptibility.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem array of LCE1-LCE6 cornified-envelope genes at 70-95% identity; ~32 kb LCE3B-LCE3C deletion polymorphism present in ~60% of Europeans; adjacent OR sub-cluster.
